text: The boy from the lower tiers—Telvar Orsson—walks louder than he thinks. Red rank is a color, not a shield.
speaker: Hooded Figure

text: Myramar smiles like a mentor and weighs you like ore. The Test of Fire will come; the question is who lights the match.
speaker: Hooded Figure

text: Drink your wine. Forget this conversation. That is the only advice I owe you.
speaker: Hooded Figure
